---
name: New Data Source
about: Propose a new data source to supplement Wikidata
title: "[DATA] Add {source_name} as supplementary data source"
labels: enhancement, data-source
assignees: ''
---

**Data source:** [e.g., Ghana Electoral Commission, AU Commission website]
**Source URL:** [URL of the data source]
**Country/Region:** [e.g., Ghana, Pan-African]

**What data does this source provide that Wikidata doesn't?**
- [ ] More complete names (middle names, titles)
- [ ] Dates of birth
- [ ] Party affiliation
- [ ] Family relationships
- [ ] Photos
- [ ] More recent appointments
- [ ] Other: ...

**Data format:**
- [ ] HTML (web scraping needed)
- [ ] PDF (gazette/official document)
- [ ] API/JSON
- [ ] CSV/Excel
- [ ] Other: ...

**Language:** [e.g., English, French, Arabic]

**Access:**
- [ ] Freely accessible (no login required)
- [ ] Has robots.txt restrictions
- [ ] Rate limited

**Notes**
Any additional context about the data source or implementation approach.
